proof: function[T0: XCoord](x0: T0, x1: Nat, x2: T0) { x0.pow(x1) = x2 = is_ecdsa_keypair[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[G](gen, d, pub)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { lib(nat).nat_mod(x0 * x1, x2) = 1 = is_mod_inv(x0, x1, x2) }(k, kinv, n)
function[T0: XCoord](x0: T0, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { lib(nat).nat_mod(x0.pow(x1).x_coord, x2) = ecdsa_sign_r[T0](x2, x0, x1) }[G](gen, k, n)
function[T0: XCoord](x0: T0, x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { lib(nat).nat_mod(x0.pow(x1).x_coord, x2) = ecdsa_sign_r[T0](x2, x0, x1) }[G](gen, k, n)

goal: ecdsa_sign_s(n, h, d, r, kinv) = lib(nat).nat_mod(kinv * (h + r * d))(n)
proof: function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat, x3: Nat, x4: Nat) { lib(nat).nat_mod(x0 * (x1 + x2 * x3), x4) = ecdsa_sign_s(x4, x1, x3, x2, x0) }(kinv, h, r, d, n)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat, x2: Nat, x3: Nat, x4: Nat) { lib(nat).nat_mod(x0 * (x1 + x2 * x3), x4) = ecdsa_sign_s(x4, x1, x3, x2, x0) }(kinv, h, r, d, n)
